name: Impossible Breakfast Pie (Quiche)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the sausage and drain it. Crumble the sausage into the bottom of a greased 11x7 inch pan.
2. Top the sausage with chopped onions and grated Mozzerella cheese.
3. In a blender, mix together the Bisquick, sour cream, eggs, salt, and pepper for about 1 minute.
4. Pour the mixture over the meat layer in the pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 35-45 minutes until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
